summary: Comprehensive testing of Nyaya Setu AI Legal Rights Platform completed. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI flows tested successfully including Landing Page, Demo Login, Home Page, Query Submission with AI Analysis, Result Page, Emergency Helplines, NGO Directory, Community Q&A, Legal Notice Generation, Profile, and History pages.

minor.issue: Sample questions returned as defaults when DB is empty - this is expected behavior per design

issues: Default language is Hindi (hi) - UI shows Hindi text. This is by design but may confuse English-speaking users initially
Helpline cards load with animation - minor delay before visible

critical_code_review_comments: Indian Kanoon API returning 405 Method Not Allowed - logged in backend but handled gracefully with fallback
React useEffect dependency warnings in multiple pages (CommunityPage, HistoryPage, LegalNoticePage, NGODirectoryPage, ProfilePage, ResultPage) - minor lint warnings, not affecting functionality
test_credentials: Demo login via 'Try Demo (No Email Required)' button - no credentials needed
seed_data_creation: NGOs seeded automatically on backend startup (12 NGOs). Community questions use sample data when DB is empty.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features working: Landing page, Demo login, Query submission with AI analysis (15-30s response time), Result page with rights/laws/steps, Emergency helplines, NGO directory with filters, Community Q&A with upvote/answer, Legal Notice generation with PDF download, Profile management, Query history. Backend uses Gemini via Emergent Integrations for AI analysis and translation. Default language is Hindi.

features_tested.landing_page: PASS - Nyaya Setu branding, Get Started Free button visible
features_tested.demo_login: PASS - Try Demo button redirects to /home
features_tested.home_page: PASS - Quick Actions (Legal Notice, Find NGOs, Community, History), Bottom Navigation, Emergency SOS button all visible
features_tested.query_submission: PASS - Voice button, text input, submit button working. AI analysis returns in 15-30 seconds
features_tested.result_page: PASS - Shows severity badge, summary, rights, laws, steps, urgency note, bookmark, share buttons
features_tested.emergency_page: PASS - SOS buttons (Police 100, Women 181, Ambulance 108), helpline cards with phone numbers
features_tested.ngo_directory: PASS - 12 NGOs loaded, search input, state filter, specialization filter working
features_tested.community_qa: PASS - Questions displayed, Ask button, upvote, answer functionality working
features_tested.legal_notice: PASS - Form fields, AI-generated notice with applicable laws, PDF download button
features_tested.profile_page: PASS - Profile form, language selector, state selector, save button, logout button
features_tested.history_page: PASS - Filter buttons (All, Saved), query history display
features_tested.bottom_navigation: PASS - Home, Ask, SOS, Community, Profile navigation working

backend_api_tests.ngo_directory: PASS - GET /api/ngos with state and specialization filters
backend_api_tests.community_qa: PASS - GET/POST questions, upvote, answer endpoints
backend_api_tests.query: PASS - POST /api/query (AI analysis), GET /api/query/{id}, GET /api/queries, POST /api/query/{id}/bookmark
